dataQuery.sqlStatement: SELECT ASS.VENDOR_NAME , ASS.SEGMENT1 VENDOR_NUMBER , ASSSA.VENDOR_SITE_CODE , AIA.INVOICE_NUM -- , AIA.INVOICE_DATE INVOICE_DATE , TO_CHAR(AIA.INVOICE_DATE,'DD-Mon-RRRR') INVOICE_DATE , AIA.INVOICE_AMOUNT , AIA.INVOICE_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE INVOICE_TYPE , ASS.ATTRIBUTE12 MSME , ASS.ATTRIBUTE4 MSME_TYPE , ASS.ATTRIBUTE5 MSME_NO -- , :P_TO_DATE CUT_OF_DATE , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(:P_FROM_DATE,1,11),'RRRR/MM/DD'),'DD-Mon-RRRR') FROM_DATE , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(:P_TO_DATE,1,11),'RRRR/MM/DD'),'DD-Mon-RRRR') CUT_OF_DATE , TO_DATE(SUBSTR(:P_TO_DATE,1,11),'RRRR/MM/DD')-DECODE(:P_DAYS_METHOD,'Invoice',AIA.INVOICE_DATE,'GL Date',AIA.GL_DATE) DAYS , TO_CHAR(AIA.GL_DATE, 'DD-Mon-RRRR') GL_DATE , AIA.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID , ACA.CHECK_NUMBER DOCUMENT_NUMBER , TO_CHAR(ACA.CHECK_DATE,'DD-Mon-RRRR') PAY_DATE , AIPA.AMOUNT PAYMENT_AMOUNT , XXAU_GST_UTILITY_PKG.TP_REGISTRATION_NUMBER@EBSTOHR(ASS.VENDOR_ID,ASSSA.VENDOR_SITE_ID,'PAN','S') PAN_NO , CASE WHEN TO_DATE(SUBSTR(:P_TO_DATE,1,11),'RRRR/MM/DD')-DECODE(:P_DAYS_METHOD,'Invoice',AIA.INVOICE_DATE,'GL Date',AIA.GL_DATE) <= 45 AND AIA.GL_DATE IS NOT NULL THEN NVL (AIPA.AMOUNT, 0) ELSE 0 END PAYMENT_AMOUNT_LE_45 , CASE WHEN TO_DATE(SUBSTR(:P_TO_DATE,1,11),'RRRR/MM/DD')-DECODE(:P_DAYS_METHOD,'Invoice',AIA.INVOICE_DATE,'GL Date',AIA.GL_DATE) > 45 AND AIA.GL_DATE IS NOT NULL THEN NVL (AIPA.AMOUNT, 0) ELSE 0 END PAYMENT_AMOUNT_GT_45 , CASE WHEN TO_DATE(SUBSTR(:P_TO_DATE,1,11),'RRRR/MM/DD')-DECODE(:P_DAYS_METHOD,'Invoice',AIA.INVOICE_DATE,'GL Date',AIA.GL_DATE) <= 45 AND AIA.GL_DATE IS NOT NULL THEN NVL (AIA.INVOICE_AMOUNT - NVL (AIPA.AMOUNT, 0), 0) ELSE 0 END OUTSTANDING_AMOUNT_LE_45 , CASE WHEN TO_DATE(SUBSTR(:P_TO_DATE,1,11),'RRRR/MM/DD')-DECODE(:P_DAYS_METHOD,'Invoice',AIA.INVOICE_DATE,'GL Date',AIA.GL_DATE) > 45 AND AIA.GL_DATE IS NOT NULL THEN NVL (AIA.INVOICE_AMOUNT - NVL (AIPA.AMOUNT, 0), 0) ELSE 0 END OUTSTANDING_AMOUNT_GT_45 FROM APPS.AP_SUPPLIERS ASS, APPS.AP_SUPPLIER_SITES_ALL ASSSA, APPS.AP_INVOICES_ALL AIA, APPS.AP_INVOICE_PAYMENTS_ALL AIPA, APPS.AP_CHECKS_ALL ACA WHERE 1=1 AND ASS.VENDOR_ID = ASSSA.VENDOR_ID AND ASS.VENDOR_ID = AIA.VENDOR_ID AND ASSSA.VENDOR_SITE_ID = AIA.VENDOR_SITE_ID AND AIA.INVOICE_ID=AIPA.INVOICE_ID(+) AND UPPER(ASS.ATTRIBUTE12)='YES' AND AIPA.CHECK_ID=ACA.CHECK_ID (+) -- AND AIA.INVOICE_NUM = '2025-26/222' AND DECODE(:P_DAYS_METHOD,'Invoice',AIA.INVOICE_DATE,'GL Date',AIA.GL_DATE) BETWEEN TO_DATE(SUBSTR(:P_FROM_DATE,1,11),'RRRR/MM/DD') AND TO_DATE(SUBSTR(:P_TO_DATE,1,11),'RRRR/MM/DD')
